name: TAT Explain Tools
description: Read-direction skills (tat-*) to understand existing systems: architecture, domains, integrations. No new design or code generation.

skills.name: tat-describe-architecture
skills.description: Use when: producing an as-is architecture diagram of a codebase, service or feature; writing or updating RFCs, design docs and onboarding material; explaining how components interact or locating the blast radius of a change. Describes existing architecture as a Mermaid diagram plus a short narrative grounded in the actual code. Does not design new architecture.
